STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER SLABACH MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE
MINUTES
(404/MAS) PET IN PRO PER. RESP NOT PRESENT. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. COURT NOTES VALID P.O.S. PET SWORN AND TESTIFIED. AFTER REVIEW OF APPLICATION AND DECLARATION, COU
RT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT AND ORDER 3YR STANDARD CONDUCT RO WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY AGAINST RESP FOR PET, HER RESIDENCE, HER PLACE OF WORK, AND FOR
LDREN. RESP TO HAVE C/V FROM FRIDAY 7PM TO SUNDAY 5PM COMMENCING 11/17/00 AND CONTINUING EVERY OTHER WEEKEND THEREAFTER. EXCHANGES TO OCCUR AT 16TH
AND MISSION STREETS. COURT SIGNS ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY CECILIA VALDEZ #1473 ING EVERY OTHER WEEKEND THEREAFTER. EXCHANGES TO OCCUR AT 16TH

ERED 11/4/00 BE SET ASIDE. COURT INFORMS PET THAT SHE NEEDS TO VERIFY IF THERE IS CRIMINAL RO AGAINST RESP THAT NEEDS TO BE LIFTED AS WELL. COURT
